steps.title: Identify the subject's number
steps.content: The subject is “more writers from Guinea, including Diallo.” The head noun “writers” is plural. The phrase “including Diallo” is parenthetical and doesn't affect the count.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: ”Have begun” is the plural verb form required for a plural subject. The other three choices are all singular forms and violate the agreement rule. This matches choice C — C is correct.
